name: GOLFTEC Toledo
about: GOLFTEC Toledo is a modern golf training facility specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION swing tracking, high-speed cameras, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing analysis. Lessons and fittings are conducted in a controlled indoor environment, focusing on measurable improvements through personalized coaching and a systematic approach to skill development.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using launch monitors and video analysis for precise feedback
Comprehensive club fitting services with shaft optimization and access to top brands
Coaches operate as a team to ensure satisfaction and progress toward personal goals

food_and_drink.notes: No food or kitchen facilities mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product and integrated technology, used for launch monitor data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent them from GOLFTEC. The facility provides a comprehensive club fitting service, allowing you to get custom-fit clubs from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at the venue. It is recommended to check directly with GOLFTEC Toledo for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not specific to the Toledo location and may depend on the simulator technology and booking. For details on simulator time for 18 holes, it is best to contact the center directly.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is suitable for juniors and youth, with programs designed for younger golfers and technology that helps them understand their swing and progress.
